## What this does

Briefly describe the change.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] If I added a rule, it has a `why` and a `fix`, plus a test for both a
      true-positive and a true-negative (safe code that must NOT be flagged)
- [ ] The change keeps ajar **defensive** — it detects and explains, never exploits

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know (references, trade-offs, follow-ups).
